Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).

This package is the JDK-native spine that lets @RestOp handlers return reactive values. It ships in the opt-in juneau-rest-server-reactive module — a bare juneau-rest-server has no reactive behavior and DefaultConfig does not wire any reactive processor. Merely placing this module on the classpath auto-registers ReactiveResponseProcessor via a META-INF/services/org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.ResponseProcessor provider file, which RestContext discovers through ServiceLoader and front-loads ahead of AsyncResponseProcessor.

The processor handles Flow.Publisher<T> directly (no external dependency) and exposes the ReactiveStreamsAdapter SPI so the further opt-in juneau-rest-server-reactive-reactor module can plug in Project Reactor, RxJava 3, and Reactive-Streams Publisher support without duplicating any of the streaming / buffering / SSE / NDJSON plumbing.

Key types
  • ReactiveResponseProcessor — the response processor (auto-registered via ServiceLoader, front-loaded ahead of AsyncResponseProcessor).
  • ReactiveStreamsAdapter — the ServiceLoader SPI bridge modules implement.
  • Adaptation — the single-value / streaming result of an adapter.
See Also:
  • REST Server — Reactive Streams
  • Reactive Streams
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.reactor
    Project Reactor / RxJava 3 / Reactive-Streams Publisher adapters for the juneau-rest-server ReactiveStreamsAdapter SPI.
  • Class
    Description
    Adaptation
    The result of a ReactiveStreamsAdapter.adapt(...) call: either a single-value CompletionStage or a multi-value Flow.Publisher.
    ReactiveResponseProcessor
    Response processor that bridges Reactive Streams return values from @RestOp handlers to Juneau's response pipeline.
    ReactiveStreamsAdapter
    SPI that bridges a third-party reactive return type to one of the two JDK-native shapes that the ReactiveResponseProcessor understands: a CompletionStage (single value) or a Flow.Publisher (a stream of values).
